description: Kafka consumer/producer pipeline metrics, event sink, query execution, and ClickHouse operations for Countly

targets.expr: sum by (group_id, topic)(rate(countly_kafka_consumer_batches_total{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", group_id=~"$group_id", topic=~"$topic", result="error"}[5m])) or vector(0)
sum by (group_id)(rate(countly_kafka_consumer_rebalances_total{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", group_id=~"$group_id"}[5m])) or vector(0)
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(countly_event_source_batch_wait_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", group_id=~"$group_id"}[5m])) by (le)) or vector(0)
sum by (query_name)(rate(countly_query_total{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", result="error"}[5m])) or vector(0)

title: Countly Pipeline & Queries
